query:
DELETE FROM espn_season_cache
WHERE viewName = 'combined'
  AND season IN (2025, 2026)
  AND id NOT IN (
    SELECT id FROM (
      SELECT id FROM espn_season_cache
      WHERE viewName = 'combined' AND season = 2025
      ORDER BY LENGTH(payload) DESC
      LIMIT 1
    ) t1
    UNION ALL
    SELECT id FROM (
      SELECT id FROM espn_season_cache
      WHERE viewName = 'combined' AND season = 2026
      ORDER BY LENGTH(payload) DESC
      LIMIT 1
    ) t2
  );
